response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the first segment (00:00-01:38.5) and identified it as a duet performance of 'Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Wakusei'. 2. Identified the performers as Momosuzu Nene and Kanade Izuru. 3. Researched the song 'Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Wakusei' (originally by Kessoku Band, lyrics by ZAQ, music by otoha) and obtained full lyrics. 4. Analyzed the subsequent segment (01:39-03:49) as a talk segment (not included as a scene with vocal music as per instructions). 5. Analyzed the final segment (03:50-04:54) as a solo performance by Momosuzu Nene of 'Sayonara Memories'. 6. Researched the song 'Sayonara Memories' (originally by supercell, lyrics/music by ryo) and obtained full lyrics. 7. Formatted all findings into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video is a live performance segment featuring VTubers Momosuzu Nene and Kanade Izuru. They first perform a duet of 'Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Wakusei', followed by an introductory segment, and then Momosuzu Nene performs a solo of 'Sayonara Memories'.

scenes.description: Momosuzu Nene and Kanade Izuru perform the song 'Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Wakusei' together on stage. On-screen text displays the song title.
scenes.song_title: Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Wakusei
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
突然降る夕立 あぁ傘もないや嫌
空のご機嫌なんか知らない
季節の変わり目の服は 何着りゃいいんだろ
春と秋どこいっちゃったんだよ
息も出来ない 情報の圧力
めまいの螺旋だ
わたしはどこにいる
こんなに こんなに
息の音がするのに
変だね 世界の音がしない
足りない 足りない
誰にも気づかれない
殴り書きみたいな音出せない状態で叫んだよ
「ありのまま」なんて 誰に見せるんだ
馬鹿なわたしは歌うだけ
ぶちまけちゃおうか 星に

エリクサーに張り替える作業もなんとなくなんだ
欠けた爪を少し触る
半径300mmの体で
必死に嗚いてる
音楽にとつちゃ ココが地球だな
空気を握って 空を殴るよ
なんにも起きない わたしは無力さ
だけどさ その手で この鉄を弾いたら
何かが変わって見えた...ような。

眩しい 眩しい そんなに光るなよ
わたしのダサい影が より色濃くなってしまうだろ
なんでこんな熱くなっちゃってんだ
止まんない
馬鹿なわたしは歌うだけ
うるさいんだって 心臓

蒼い惑星 ひとりぼっち
いっぱいの音を聞いてきた
回り続けて 幾億年
一瞬でもいいから...ああ 聞いて
聴けよ
わたし わたし わたしはここにいる
殴り書きみたいな音出せない状態で叫んだよ
なんかになりたい なりたい
何者かでいい
馬鹿なわたしは歌うだけ
ぶちまけちゃおうか 星に
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Suddenly the evening shower comes, ah I don't even have an umbrella, I hate this
I don't know the sky's mood
What should I wear for the changing of the seasons?
Where did spring and autumn go?
I can't even breathe, the pressure of information
It's a spiral of dizziness
I'm here, I'm here
Even though I can hear the sound of breathing
It's strange, I don't hear the sound of the world
Not enough, not enough, nobody notices me
I shouted in a state where I couldn't produce a sound like scribbles
Who am I showing my true self to?
I, an idiot, just sing
Should I spill it all out to the stars?
Changing strings to Elixir is just something I do somehow
I touch my chipped nail a little
With a body with a radius of 300mm, I'm desperately crying out
For music, this place is the Earth
I grasp the air and punch the sky
Nothing happens, I'm powerless
But, if I pluck this iron with those hands
It looked like something changed... maybe.
Dazzling, dazzling, don't shine so much
My lame shadow will become even darker, won't it?
Why am I getting so hot?
It won't stop
I, an idiot, just sing
My heart is noisy
Blue planet, all alone
I've heard so many sounds
Continuing to spin for hundreds of millions of years
Even for a moment is fine... ah, listen
Listen to it
I, I, I am here
I shouted in a state where I couldn't produce a sound like scribbles
I want to become something, I want to become something
Anything is fine, even if I'm not anyone special
I, an idiot, just sing
Should I spill it all out to the stars?
